rationale: The citing paper uses Dhar and Wertenbroch (2000) only as part of a grouped background citation in the choosing-versus-rejecting literature, specifically to note that decision type can affect product preference in prior one-shot decisions. The cited work is not discussed in detail, and the citing paper does not build its hypotheses, mechanism tests, measures, or analyses directly on that study. Its role is therefore contextual literature support rather than a distinct functional pillar in this article.
